falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Workers can or should run on Bun, or colocating Temporal code under packages/engine is the wrong default.
falsificationQueries: Temporal TypeScript SDK Bun worker support
Temporal TypeScript SDK Node runtime requirements
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The strongest available evidence points the other direction: Temporal's TypeScript worker runtime is Node-oriented and Bun is not the safe default. The main challenge is operational friction from mixed runtimes, not technical invalidity.
